# Ultima IV dungeon: deceit
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  30  ladder_both
#   &  40  chest
#   '  70  fountain
#   (  80  field
#   )  81  field_1
#   *  8e  field_e
#   +  90  room
#   ,  91  room_1
#   -  a0  altar
#   .  a1  altar_1
#   /  a2  altar_2
#   0  a3  altar_3
#   1  b0  door_special
#   2  c0  kind_c
#   3  d0  door
#   4  d1  door_1
#   5  d2  door_2
#   6  d3  door_3
#   7  d4  door_4
#   8  d5  door_5
#   9  d6  door_6
#   :  d7  door_7
#   ;  d8  door_8
#   <  d9  door_9
#   =  da  door_a
#   >  db  door_b
#   ?  dc  door_c
#   @  dd  door_d
#   A  de  door_e
#   B  df  door_f
#   C  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|FFF~FFF~|
|F!~~2~F~|
|F~FFF~F~|
|~~F3~~F~|
|F2F~FFFF|
|F~~~F$~+|
|FFFFF~F~|
|~~~~F+~~|
== level 1 ==
|FFFFF~F~|
|456$F~F~|
|FFFFF~FF|
|~~F~2~F~|
|F2F~FFF~|
|2)2~F!F~|
|F2F~F~F~|
|F~~~F~F~|
== level 2 ==
|F~FFF~F~|
|F$F!F$F~|
|FFF~FFF~|
|F~2~2~~~|
|F~F2FFFF|
|~~F~7F'~|
|FFF~FFFF|
|F~~~~~F'|
== level 3 ==
|FFF&FFF2|
|F!&&F%~~|
|F&FFFFF2|
|F&F~~~~~|
|F&F~FFFF|
|&&F8F&&&|
|FFFFF&FF|
|~9F&&&F~|
== level 4 ==
|FFF2FFFF|
|)'F~C!()|
|FFF2FFFF|
|~,~~F&&&|
|FFFFF&F&|
|F~~$F:&&|
|F~F~FFFF|
|F~~~F$;$|
== level 5 ==
|FF~FFFFF|
|~$~F$F~~|
|2FFF)F~F|
|~))))F~~|
|F'FFFFF~|
|FFF!~<F~|
|F=FFF~F~|
|F~~~F!F!|
== level 6 ==
|FFFFF~F~|
|F!F(!~F~|
|FFF(FFF2|
|~$F)F>~~|
|FFF*F~F~|
|F/-.F~~?|
|F0F-F2FF|
|F10/F~F$|
== level 7 ==
|F~~~~~FF|
|FBF~F~))|
|FFF~~~F)|
|F!FFFFFA|
|F~F~~~*)|
|F~@~F~FF|
|~~F~~~F~|
|FFFFFFF!|
# crc32: 3751046c
